mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys.warehouse (goods_name, goods_code, spec, quantity, in_date, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{goodsName}, #{goodsCode}, #{spec}, #{quantity}, #{inDate}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO sys.warehouse_in (goods_code, spec, quantity, in_date, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{goodsCode}, #{spec}, #{quantity}, #{inDate}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO warehouse_out ( goods_code, out_quantity, out_date, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{goodsCode}, #{outQuantity}, #{outDate}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys.warehouse SET remark = #{remark}, spec = #{spec}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys.warehouse SET quantity = #{quantity}, spec = #{spec}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM warehouse wi where goods_code = #{goodsCode}

SELECT * FROM warehouse_in wi
AND wi.in_date = #{inDate}

SELECT count(*) FROM warehouse wi
AND wi.in_date = #{inDate}

SELECT * FROM warehouse_out wi
AND wi.out_date = #{outDate}

SELECT count(*) FROM warehouse_out wi
AND wi.out_date = #{outDate}
